dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Victim #4 already.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: Hnnngh...

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: I had dispatched a clear warning to all relevant personnel that they must steer clear of the Abnormality's containment unit while Work is in progress, as the biohazardous material the entity secretes could permeate through the barrier.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: ... Perhaps it could not be helped, as the authority to physically quarantine a section of the facility lies with the manager.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: Itchy... Captain, I'm so itchy...

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: The subject complained of the pruritus of her nape for the 27th time.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: I probably shouldn't scratch the itch, right...? Captain...?

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Scratching your skin to address the itchiness will not be a problem.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: There is no need for you to worry about the bleeding or excoriation of your skin.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: Ah... Agh...

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: "Amber" of the Clerical staff. That is you, correct?

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: Tha-that's correct... Agh...

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: The subject complained of pruritus for the 28th time since the beginning of this interview. Primary memory retention ability remains in good condition.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: With that, I record that 10 or more casualties have shown no changes to the brain activity at the 23 hours, 06 minutes, and 21 seconds mark since spore inhalation.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Extrapolation: Occipital lobe hypertrophy, observed in the late stages of spore infection—henceforth the "pre-hatch" state—accelerates rapidly at an undetermined time since initial contact. This finding boosts the value of "early egg identification & extermination" protocol research by 7.1409%.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: Sorry, what are you... saying...?

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Nothing that requires your comprehension.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: No, I mean... I can't seem to... hear you clearly...

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: Ngh... Ow... Ow, my belly hurts...!

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Loss of hearing identified. This is the first recorded instance of such a symptom among the casualties.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Hold still. I will use a bioscanner on your abdomen.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: Is that... ngh... Is that gonna... make whatever this is go away?

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: It will not. Remove your hands from your abdomen.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: Agh...

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Larva activity observed at the 23 hours, 07 minutes, and 01 seconds mark since spore inhalation. This instance has occurred 33% earlier compared to the average extrapolated from the preexisting data's standard normal distribution.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Slight palpitations of the occipital lobe area have been observed concurrently. The palpitation is currently traveling to the subject's auditory organ, which leads one to conjecture that it is related to the victim's hearing loss.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: There's... There's something skittering around in there...

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: The interval of its molting process from instar 2 to instar 3 remains the same within the margin of error.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: C-Captain, there's this guy I hang out with all the time... Jacob. He was with me when it happened... Is he... okay?

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: ... "Okay" in what sense?

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: Uh...? Sorry, I can't... hear you. Ah, that's better. It doesn't hurt as much...

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Nullification of pain receptors identified. I will now post any subsequent questions in writing.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: Ah... Is he "okay" as in "HE'S NOT SICK," RIGHT?!

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: ... I drew an "X" on paper to relay to the victim that Jacob was indeed not sick.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: Oh, that's... good... Huh, I feel funny. Like I'm bloated—

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: Uh, Captain Meursault, what's up with the E.G.O Weapon—

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Immediate pre-eclosion symptoms identified. Preparing for battle.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: Oh, that's... right... She's so close by...

dataList.title: Welfare Team Clerk
dataList.content: ... My Queen.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: It's hatching.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: … Eclosion of entity T-04-50-2 identified and eliminated.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: And the subsequent emergence of Amber Ordeal, also identified.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: ... Eliminated.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Reporting test results of conducting an interview near T-04-50's containment unit. While no variance in the interval between contraction and the late stage of infection has been observed, it can be said that the subject perceives the "Queen" at a relatively earlier point.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Recording an observation of note: the entity spoke through the victim immediately before eclosion, suggesting that it has the capability to seize the victim's nervous system.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: And...

dataList.title: Welfare Team Agent
dataList.content: Hey, Captain.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Mm.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Agent
dataList.content: You know W.I.H.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Another containment breach.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Agent
dataList.content: Don't fault me, Captain.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Agent
dataList.content: No matter what I do, whether I do good or bad, it goes apeshit. It's shit luck, that's what.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: The difficulty of managing the Abnormality is acknowledged. However, continued shirking and offloading of your suppression responsibility to other employees is inappropriate.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: I believe former Captains should be held to a higher degree of accountability.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Agent
dataList.content: Take a good look at these weapons the fool of a manager gave me, and say that again.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Agent
dataList.content: Its creepy face didn't change one bit, no matter how many bullets I blasted into it.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: ... I have shared the absurdity of your weapon assignment with Mister Chesed, but it appears that he has not yet found the time to pay the manager a visit.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Agent
dataList.content: The manager... the B.T.C.... Bunch of slackers, all of them.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Agent
dataList.content: Well... not that I mind. The more they laze about, the more opportunities for art appreciation time I get.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: ... The Dusk Ordeal is still in progress. Search for other hallways to assist.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Agent
dataList.content: You're B.A.H. as always, Captain.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Mm.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: ... Welfare Team hallways are clear.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: As for the interview subject's corpse— Hm.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: ... It will be cremated alongside victim Jacob's cadaver.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Concluding the interview.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: ... What is the meaning of your gaze?

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Is it wrath? Because I killed your worker bee with the very weapon extracted from your essence?

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Or... does it look like just another "redemption" or "love" from where you stand?

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: I am curious. How does it all appear in your eyes?

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: Does it appear as inscrutable as my gaze is to you?

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: ... Didn't expect to get sentimental. I will have to check my Corrosion rate.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: However, the first order of business is completing the suppression effort.

dataList.title: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.content: End of recording.
